title: LSNClaimInfo
description: A mod specially made for Lifesteal.net to show claim info when entering a claim!   Made by Jonnite
body:
---

# 📄 What is this Mod?
This mod introduces the ability to click the entered claim message to run /claim info "team name" command. This mod is created specially for Lifesteal.net and will **not** work on other servers.

# ✅ Features
1. One of a kind
2. Lightweight and optimized
3. Enhanced gameplay experience
4. No setup required


# 💿 How to Use
1. Drag the mod into your mods folder.
2. Relaunch your game, and the mod will work straight out of the box. 
3. Join **Lifesteal.net** and enjoy!

# ⚙️ Supported Versions
Currently supported on **Fabric 1.21,1.20.1**. More Versions will be added in the future.
